scripts.validate: bun run lint:fix && bun run typecheck && bun run build
scripts.validate:ci: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run build && bun run generate:check
scripts.generate: cargo test --features full -p yauth -- generate_openapi_spec --exact --nocapture --include-ignored && bunx orval
scripts.generate:check: cargo test --features full -p yauth -- check_openapi_spec_up_to_date --exact --nocapture && bunx orval && git diff --exit-code packages/client/src/generated.ts packages/client/src/generated.msw.ts
